monitoringPlan: run helix doctor and legacy alias smoke during the quiet window
rebuild harness.db and inspect status/completion decision packet
check rule-drift, hook adapter parity, and green-command digest after cutover
watch feedback backlog, handover, and runtime logs for path or marker regressions

probes.commandAfterApproval: helix doctor && helix status && helix completion decision-packet --json
probes.currentNoWriteProxyCommand: bun run src/cli.ts doctor --json && bun run src/cli.ts status --json && bun run src/cli.ts completion decision-packet --json
probes.expected: doctor stays green and status/completion packet keeps PLAN-M-02 evidence bound to the approved snapshot
probes.rollbackTrigger: doctor red, status regression, or completion packet evidence drift

probes.currentNoWriteProxyCommand: bun run src/cli.ts rename dist-smoke --no-write --target helix --json && bun run src/cli.ts handover
probes.expected: legacy alias disposition and handover/runtime log continuity are observable during the quiet window
probes.rollbackTrigger: alias breakage without approved sunset route or runtime path regression in logs/handover

probes.currentNoWriteProxyCommand: bun run src/cli.ts doctor --json && bun run src/cli.ts feedback status --json
probes.expected: rule-drift, hook adapter parity, and feedback backlog stay inside the approved cutover boundary
probes.rollbackTrigger: rule-drift, hook parity failure, or cutover-related feedback backlog escalation

blockedUntil: action_binding_approval_record scopes the quiet window, monitoring commands, rollback owner, and rollback trigger handling
post-cutover monitoring dry-run evidence is recorded before apply
